content_of_post_to_comment:
I, 15m, hate everything. I hate getting out of bed, I hate putting on clothes, I hate going outside, staying inside, eating, not eating, being productive, being unproductive....I just hate everything.

I hate the people in my life. I hate doing things that I used to enjoy, and I can't find anything else to enjoy because I end up hating how long it takes to get into and I drop it. ​I want to get in touch with God and start reading the Bible and doing prayers and things of that nature, but I just can't will myself to keep trying because every time I try to improve myself, it feels like everything is against me. And thus I've begun to hate trying to improve myself, and I've even had thoughts in the back of my mind about hating Him, which I don't want to have.

Throughout every day, all I can feel is a burning hatred inside my heart for everyone and everything. I don't even feel anything other than hatred either. I can't cry and I don't have fun doing anything either. I have nothing to look forward to, I have "friends" and "family", but nobody I feel I can truly talk to, and all of the things I once really enjoyed doing I find myself physically rejecting.

So I basically just want to know, what should I do to stop hating? And how can I start loving what I used to do again?
comment: The part about physically rejecting things you used to enjoy sounds really hard. Sometimes when your brain is stuck in that state, trying to force yourself to become a better person just creates more frustration. Maybe the goal right now isn't to love everything again, but to find one tiny thing that feels slightly less awful and start there. Have you been feeling this way for weeks or months?
